chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ بَعْدَ أَنْ يُغَسَّلَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – What comes out from the deceased after having been washed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/333)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/333)
text: إِذَا غُسِّلَ الْمَيِّتُ ثُمَّ أَحْدَثَ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يُغْسَلُ الْحَدَثُ وَ لَا يُعَادُ الْغُسْلُ .

en.hubeali: From him, from one of his companions, raising it, said:
‘When the deceased is washed, then excretes after the washing, so the excretion should be washed off, and the (whole) washing would not be repeated’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is a narration from him (narrator of previous Hadith) by certain persons of his people in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘After Ghusl (bath), if something happens, only that part is washed and repeating Ghusl (bath) is not required.’”
